zh.Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Mobberley於大約1315年出生在英國爾莫波利時，她的父親William Mobberly33歲，母親Maud Downes37歲。她於1327年與Robert le Grosvenor在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1366年在英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德享年53歲，埋葬在英國爾瑟 奧福。

zh-hans.Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England: 英国爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Mobberley于大约1315年出生在英国爾莫波利时，她的父亲William Mobberly33岁，母亲Maud Downes37岁。她于1327年与Robert le Grosvenor在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1366年在英国爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德享年53岁，埋葬在英国爾瑟 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mobberley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moverley
meanings: English: a Yorks variant of   Mobberley  .

variants.name: Moberly
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Mobberley in Cheshire. The placename derives from Old English mōt ‘meeting’ + burg ‘fortress’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Moberley
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Hampshire): variant of   Moberly  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Mobberley was born about 1315, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, her father, William Mobberly, was 33 and her mother, Maud Downes, was 37. She married Robert le Grosvenor in 1327, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1366, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Nether Peover, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Mobberley est née environ 1315, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mobberly, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maud Downes, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Robert le Grosvenor en 1327, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1366, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Nether Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Mobberley um 1315 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mobberly 33 und ihre Mutter Maud Downes 37. Sie hat 1327 in Cheshire, England Robert le Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1366 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England und wurde in Nether Peover, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Mobberley è nata il circa 1315 nel Mobberley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Mobberly, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Maud Downes, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Robert le Grosvenor nel 1327, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1366, nel Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Nether Peover, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Mobberleyが約1315年にイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーで生まれた時，父William Mobberlyは33歳，母Maud Downesは37歳であった。1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアでRobert le Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1366年にイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドで53歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアネスエル ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Mobberley(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 체실르 모브벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mobberly(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Downes(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 체실르에서 Robert le Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1366년 영국 체실르 훌 월필드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 네터 p오버에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1315–about 1366: tany ho any amin'ny 1315–tany ho any amin'ny 1366

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Mobberley nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mobberly, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maud Downes, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert le Grosvenor em 1327, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1366, em Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Nether Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Mobberley родилась около 1315 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mobberly было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Downes, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert le Grosvenor в 1327 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1366 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности нетир пеовир, чешир, Англия.

sm.about 1315–about 1366: e tusa o le 1315–e tusa o le 1366

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Mobberley nació aproximadamente 1315, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mobberly, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Maud Downes, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Robert le Grosvenor en 1327, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1366, en Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Nether Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
